title: Online Passport Renewal
description: We modernized passport renewals from the ground up as a mobile-first, fully accessible system.

impact.headline: 2 million renewals in 5 months
impact.description: Replaced a paper-based, weeks-long process with a digital experience that meets citizens where they are.

impact.headline: 5 minutes to complete
impact.description: Average time for a citizen to renew their passport online, down from weeks by mail.

clientQuote.quote: This team didn't just build a website — they changed how Americans interact with one of our most essential services.
clientQuote.name: Senior Program Official, Bureau of Consular Affairs

title: Paid Family & Medical Leave
client: Massachusetts Department of Family and Medical Leave
description: Built resilient adjudication and payment systems for the state's paid leave program from initial launch through ongoing operations.

impact.headline: $4.5+ billion in benefits paid
impact.description: Total benefits distributed to Massachusetts workers since the program launched in 2021.

impact.headline: 98.7% on-time payment rate
impact.description: Claimants receive approved benefits within the statutory timeframe.

clientQuote.quote: Focus helped us launch a brand-new benefits program on time and at scale. The system they built is still the backbone of how we serve Massachusetts workers.
clientQuote.name: Director of Technology, MA DFML

title: Minnesota Paid Leave
client: Minnesota Department of Employment and Economic Development
description: Helping Minnesota stand up its new paid leave program with modern technology and delivery practices informed by prior state implementations.

impact.headline: $70 million in estimated cost savings
impact.description: Leveraged lessons from Massachusetts to accelerate delivery and reduce implementation risk.

title: New Jersey Unemployment Insurance
description: Modernized the unemployment insurance claims system to improve processing speed and reduce the backlog that built up during the pandemic.

impact.headline: Claims backlog reduced by 85%
impact.description: Stabilized a system under extreme load and built a path toward sustainable long-term modernization.

title: Healthcare.gov
description: Supported the ongoing modernization of Healthcare.gov, improving enrollment workflows and system resilience during open enrollment periods.

impact.headline: 16+ million enrollments supported annually
impact.description: Improved system stability during peak enrollment while reducing manual workarounds for edge cases.

title: CDC ReportStream
client: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
description: Built and scaled CDC's electronic reporting pipeline for public health data, connecting labs, hospitals, and state health departments.

impact.headline: Millions of test results routed to 60+ jurisdictions
impact.description: Created a reusable, standards-based data pipeline that outlasted the pandemic response it was built for.

clientQuote.quote: The pipeline they built became critical infrastructure — not just for COVID, but for public health reporting going forward.
clientQuote.name: Technical Lead, CDC USDS

title: CMS Cloud Infrastructure (OSRE)
description: Supported CMS's cloud migration and platform operations, improving developer experience and security posture across multiple application teams.

impact.headline: 50+ applications supported on shared platform
impact.description: Shifted teams from manual infrastructure management to self-service, compliant cloud patterns.

title: Preventive Medicaid Services
client: Department of Health and Human Services
description: Working to improve data quality and reporting for preventive Medicaid services across state programs.

impact.headline: Data coverage expanded across 12 states
impact.description: Better data visibility into preventive care delivery helping inform federal policy decisions.

title: FAFSA Simplification
description: Contributed to the effort to simplify the Free Application for Federal Student Aid, reducing barriers to financial aid access.

impact.headline: Application reduced from 108 to 36 questions
impact.description: Helped make financial aid more accessible for first-generation and low-income students.

title: ACF Grants Modernization
description: Modernizing grant management workflows to reduce administrative burden for grantees and program staff.

impact.headline: 30% reduction in grant reporting time
impact.description: Shifted focus from compliance paperwork to program outcomes by simplifying reporting and approvals.

title: Simpler Grants.gov
client: Department of Health and Human Services
description: Making the federal grants experience simpler and more accessible for applicants and grant-making agencies.

impact.headline: Serving 26 federal grant-making agencies
impact.description: Reducing the complexity that discourages smaller organizations from applying for federal funding.

title: Physician Assistant Compact System
description: Building the digital infrastructure for the PA Compact, enabling physician assistants to practice across state lines.

impact.headline: Compact spanning 20+ member states
impact.description: Reducing licensure friction so healthcare providers can serve patients where they're needed most.
